common.offline_message: You're offline. Some actions may be delayed until the connection returns.
common.press_back_again_to_exit: Press back again to exit the app.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to access the phone marketplace, manage orders, wallet activity, and notifications.
auth.register_subtitle: Create a new account using the fields required by the backend, then start using the app immediately.
auth.login_info: Use your existing account to sign in, or create a new one if you do not have an account yet.
auth.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.email_taken: This email address is already registered. Try logging in or use a different email.
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.

home.hero_title: Discover phones that fit your needs
home.hero_subtitle: Browse the latest devices from marketplace sellers and store inventory in one clear flow.
home.categories_subtitle: Start from the type of device you want.
home.featured_products_subtitle: Latest devices added from inventory and marketplace sellers.
home.device_requests_subtitle: Users currently looking for specific devices.
home.device_request_hint: Open the device requests section to send an offer.
home.empty_message: The home feed does not contain any items at the moment.
home.no_requests_message: Approved device requests will appear here when available.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Browse phones listed from store inventory or marketplace users.
products.categories_filter_subtitle: Choose a category to narrow the listing.
products.empty_message: Try changing the filters or come back later for new listings.

product_details.title: Product details
product_details.empty_message: This product could not be found right now.
product_details.inventory_flow_hint: This item belongs to store inventory and will use a direct purchase flow with variant selection later.
product_details.marketplace_flow_hint: This item belongs to a marketplace seller and will use a seller-approval order flow later.
product_details.variants_subtitle: Select the right color or variant before starting an order later.
product_details.related_subtitle: More products from the same category.
product_details.related_empty_message: Related items will appear here when available.
product_details.cta_inventory_subtitle: The direct order flow with variant and payment selection will be connected next.
product_details.cta_inventory_out_of_stock_subtitle: Current variants are not available for ordering right now.
product_details.cta_marketplace_subtitle: The future order flow will require seller approval before finalizing the purchase.
product_details.cta_unavailable_subtitle: This status does not allow starting a new order right now.
product_details.future_order_hint: Order and payment submission will be implemented in the next phase.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Track purchases and sales requests from one place.
orders.payment_wallet_subtitle: Wallet balance will be used when the matching order stage is approved.
orders.payment_stripe_subtitle: Only payment method selection is wired for now. Real processing comes later.
orders.payment_cod_subtitle: Payment will be confirmed later with delivery or directly with the seller.
orders.wallet_balance_hint: If you choose wallet payment, the backend will validate the balance when the order is submitted or approved.
orders.wallet_balance_unavailable: Wallet balance is currently unavailable. You can still choose another payment method.
orders.wallet_sufficient_message: Your current wallet balance covers this order amount.
orders.wallet_insufficient_title: Wallet balance is not enough for this order.
orders.wallet_insufficient_message: Choose another payment method or submit a recharge request and wait for admin approval.
orders.shipping_address_hint: Enter street, city, region, phone number, or the contact details required for this request.
orders.shipping_address_required: Shipping address or contact details are required.
orders.checkout_inventory_subtitle: Set the shipping address and payment method to send this order.
orders.checkout_marketplace_subtitle: The request will go through admin review and then seller approval.
orders.empty_buyer_message: Start by requesting a product from inventory or the marketplace.
orders.empty_sales_message: Buyer requests for your marketplace products will appear here.
orders.auth_required_message: Log in to view and manage your orders.
orders.sales_unavailable_message: This page is only relevant for user-listed marketplace products.
orders.approve_dialog_message: This will attempt to approve the request if the admin state allows it.
orders.reject_dialog_message: This will reject the request and notify the buyer.
orders.detail_empty_message: This order could not be found right now.
orders.timeline_inventory_pending_subtitle: The order was sent and is waiting for admin review.
orders.timeline_inventory_approved_subtitle: The admin approved the order and it is ready for fulfillment.
orders.timeline_inventory_shipping_subtitle: The order has moved into shipping.
orders.timeline_marketplace_pending_subtitle: The order is waiting for admin review.
orders.timeline_marketplace_admin_pending_subti: The admin has not approved the request yet.
orders.timeline_marketplace_admin_approved_subt: The admin approved the request and forwarded it to the seller.
orders.timeline_marketplace_seller_pending_subt: The seller has not responded yet.
orders.timeline_marketplace_completed_subtitle: The request is approved and later payment or handoff steps can continue.
orders.self_purchase_subtitle: You cannot create an order for your own listing.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Track your balance, wallet movements, and recharge requests from one place.
wallet.empty_message: Wallet data is not available right now.
wallet.empty_transactions_message: Approved wallet movements will appear here when available.
wallet.empty_recharges_message: Submitted recharge requests will appear here after you send one.
wallet.recharge_sheet_subtitle: Submit a deposit request and wait for admin approval before the balance changes.
wallet.amount_hint: Enter the amount you want to recharge
wallet.amount_required: Enter a valid amount greater than or equal to 1.
wallet.method_syriatel_cash_subtitle: Submit the request using Syriatel Cash and attach proof if available.
wallet.method_mtn_cash_subtitle: Submit the request using MTN Cash and attach proof if available.
wallet.method_stripe_subtitle: This only submits the selected method to the backend. Real card processing is not integrated yet.
wallet.proof_upload_hint: You can attach a JPG or PNG image if you have transfer proof. This is optional.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Review account alerts, order updates, wallet messages, and device offers.
notifications.empty_state_message: Your account notifications will appear here when the backend creates them.
notifications.mark_all_success: All notifications were marked as read.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account details, notifications access, and session actions.
profile.empty_message: Profile data could not be loaded right now.
profile.load_error_fallback: An unexpected error occurred while loading the profile.
profile.update_error_fallback: An unexpected error occurred while updating the profile.
profile.delete_error_fallback: An unexpected error occurred while deleting the account.
profile.edit_subtitle: Update your basic account information supported by the backend.
profile.edit_form_subtitle: Only name and email can be edited
profile.notifications_subtitle: Review read and unread database notifications.
profile.seller_dashboard_subtitle: Manage your marketplace listings and seller-side activity.
profile.logout_subtitle: End the current session on this device.
profile.logout_dialog_message: Do you really want to log out of this account on this device?
profile.delete_subtitle: Permanently remove your account and clear the current session.
profile.delete_dialog_message: This will permanently delete your account. This action cannot be undone.

seller.dashboard_subtitle: Review your marketplace performance and manage your listings.
seller.dashboard_empty_message: Seller dashboard data is not available right now.
seller.my_listings_subtitle: Create, update, and remove your marketplace listings.
seller.listings_empty_message: Create your first marketplace listing to start selling.
seller.create_listing_subtitle: Submit a marketplace listing for your product
seller.edit_listing_subtitle: Update the editable listing fields and image set supported by the current API.
seller.delete_dialog_message: This listing will be permanently removed from your account.
seller.images_subtitle: Upload between 1 and 5 images. No cropping or editing is applied.
seller.create_image_required: At least one image is required to create a listing.
seller.listings_images_limit: You can upload a maximum of 5 images per listing.

device_requests.title: Device requests
device_requests.subtitle: Browse approved device requests and send an offer when you can help.
device_requests.empty_message: Approved device requests will appear here when available.
device_requests.create_subtitle: Tell the marketplace which device you are looking for. New requests are reviewed before approval.
device_requests.create_success: Your request was submitted and is now waiting for review.
device_requests.offer_success: Your offer was sent successfully to the requester.

devices.title: Devices
devices.subtitle: Explore the master phone catalog and open full device profiles before comparing models.
devices.search_hint: Search by brand, model, processor, or display
devices.brand_filter_subtitle: Use a quick brand filter after loading the device catalog.
devices.empty_message: Try another search term or clear the current filters.
devices.details_empty_message: This device profile could not be found right now.
devices.no_specifications: This device does not contain detailed specifications yet.

compare.title: Compare devices
compare.subtitle: Pick two devices from the master catalog and review their specifications side by side.
compare.select_placeholder: Select a device from the list below.
compare.empty_message: Try another search keyword to find devices for comparison.
compare.result_subtitle: The comparison request is loaded on this page and updates when the API returns the result.
compare.results_empty_message: The comparison result is not available right now.

ai_advisor.title: AI phone advisor
ai_advisor.subtitle: Describe what kind of phone you need in Arabic or English and review the suggested marketplace products.
ai_advisor.query_hint: Example: I need a used iPhone with a strong camera under 450 dollars
ai_advisor.fallback_notice: The AI provider fallback search was used, but the response is still valid.
ai_advisor.empty_message: Try making the request broader or changing the budget and usage requirements.
